title: Revolve – Refreshing Classic Textures
body:
![img](https://i.imgur.com/TdqQMmV.png)

Nothing can make your Minecraft feel more classic than using
the original textures. But do you want the modern polished aesthetic as well?
Look no further; your nostalgia bells are gonna ring harder with Revolve,
a pack that combines both of these styles with quality-of-life enhancements!

![img](https://i.imgur.com/HQkmucp.png)

Revolved uses the classic textures as a basis and redraws them in the Jappa
art style to create a harmonious combination of old & new. With additional polishes and
fixes, the result is over 1,500 remastered & overhauled textures for all things nostalgia!
